Name: Employee Directory
Description: Contains current employee records: names, job titles, departments, and email addresses. Use for questions about staff, org structure, or team membership.
ContextQuery: SELECT e.FirstName, e.LastName, e.Email, d.Name AS Department, e.JobTitle FROM dbo.Employees e JOIN dbo.Departments d ON e.DepartmentId = d.Id WHERE (@Department IS NULL OR d.Name = @Department) ORDER BY d.Name, e.LastName

Parameters.Name: Department
Parameters.Description: The department name to filter by (e.g. 'Engineering', 'Sales'). Use null to return employees from all departments.

Name: Product Catalog
Description: Contains the current product inventory: SKUs, names, prices, stock levels, and categories. Use for questions about products, availability, or pricing.
ContextQuery: SELECT p.Sku, p.Name, p.Price, p.StockQuantity, c.Name AS Category FROM dbo.Products p JOIN dbo.Categories c ON p.CategoryId = c.Id WHERE p.IsActive = 1 AND (@Category IS NULL OR c.Name = @Category) AND (@MaxPrice IS NULL OR p.Price <= CAST(@MaxPrice AS DECIMAL(18,2))) ORDER BY c.Name, p.Name

Parameters.Name: Category
Parameters.Description: The product category to filter by (e.g. 'Electronics', 'Clothing'). Use null to return all categories.

Parameters.Name: MaxPrice
Parameters.Description: Maximum price filter as a number (e.g. '50', '199.99'). Use null for no price limit.
